s22 ultra vs s23 ultra vs s24 ultra vs s25 ultra vs s26 ultra speed speakers pubg amp updates matthews tech even side by side it s hard to tell the difference i ll stick with my s23 ultra till the day she dies absolute beast of a phone the comparison of the galaxy s22 ultra through the s26 ultra highlights a shift from the distinct boxy design to a more rounded conventional smartphone shape while the s24 ultra is noted as a peak for build quality and features the newer s25 and s26 versions introduced several hardware trade offs design amp build samsung moved away from the sharp rectangular look in the latest models notably the s26 reverted to an aluminum frame after the s25 s brief use of titanium s pen functionality decreased in the newest models as the s25 and s26 lost bluetooth remote capabilities and transitioned to a lighter less premium feeling stylus display the curved screens of the s22 and s23 were replaced by flat panels the s26 introduces a first generation privacy screen feature though it slightly impacts brightness and color accuracy performance the s22 is prone to overheating whereas the s23 and later models offer much better thermal efficiency and battery life the s24 s25 and s26 are also eligible for seven years of os updates camera amp audio most improvements in the newer models are found in low light photography and video stabilization rather than standard daytime photos speaker quality improved significantly after the s22 with the s25 and s26 providing much fuller bass charging the s26 offers a speed bump to 60w charging compared to the 45w standard on the previous four generations the s24 ultra is highlighted as the most balanced option retaining the bluetooth s pen and high quality anti reflective coating that were altered in subsequent releases i don t see how a consistent design should be seen as a problem someone to summarize i didn t watch this video but my s22 ultra still serves me well and i don t see any reason to upgrade yet not for that money you would be overpaying a lot galuxy brothers for the galaxy line upgrading for the spec bump has been futile for a while now i simply upgrade when my old phone wears out i m just waiting for new battery tech to come in which hopefully comes with next year s model before i replace my s22u but the inefficient cpu and overheating at heavy load makes me want to drop it already other than that it s still a perfectly serviceable phone honestly probably still better than newer non top of the line phones

ntfsplus driver updated as it works toward the mainline kernel so we can finally get an ntfs driver that does not require to boot windows and perform a disk check when you did shutdown windows instead of rebooting it yes that is really a thing as far as i know not at all ntfs s permission model is incompatible with unix and some important linux binaries are permission sensitive and so would refuse to run but also why would you want to do that it probably won t and it s not its fault windows is doing partial hibernate during shutdown and some file system metadata of all mounted partitions are restored when windows is starting making write unsafe if you want to use windows partitions on linux without rebooting windows disable fast startup isn t that because windows basically hibernates on shutdown by default no because that has nothing to do with the ntfs driver windows leaves the filesystem locked when it hibernates which it must do otherwise its state would get corrupted if you don t want that to happen when you shut down disable fast startup so now i can make my root filesystem ntfs and it will actually run there was a time when you could have your root filesystem in a directory on a fat32 drive not as a disk image but every file of the linux filesystem was a file on the fat32 filesystem with additional files for permissions and stuff there was a exe file you could run from dos that started linux was a very risk less was to try linux no partitioning or boot loader needed why i suddenly remember that i have no idea that would be great you can already do that with ntfs3 actually i have an installation of mx linux that s running on an ntfs partition mx linux makes the actual root filesystem a series of layers one layer is a squashfs filesystem that contains all the actual content another layer is the writable in ram filesystem and if you want persistence you can use a disk image file instead of ram still not the actual filesystem root things like user group ids and the three octal digits for permissions just don t map well to ntfs

i am crashing out please someone help i want to start but this damn thing wont recognise the code ive been at this for like two days ty too much detail here to go through how do you expect anyone to help you if you don t give any kind of information about your issue what are you exactly trying to do what errors are you exactly getting the thing the damn thing didn t you read the post it s the thing he s crashing out over stop asking questions and help him with the thing the damn thing don t skip class don t skip reading what how do you expect anyone to help you if you don t give any kind of information about your issue i may have an idea what the root cause is turn on copilot chat and ask it it would have solved this for you within a minute of you having the problem instead of you crashing out for 2 days you have a spell checking extension and it s set to american spellings it s not an error it s just telling you you ve spelt it wrong please try to put yourself in the shoes of who is going to help you next time cspell is an extension that does spell checking it has no impact on your code it s a blue squiggle underneath indicating info rather than a warning yellow or error red you can remove the extension or right click the word and add it to cspells list of allowable words vscode doesn t build unity projects go back to the basics and learn what the fuck you re doing

question how to transfer information from one custom resource to another while not falling victim to concurrency hi all im new ish to k8s ive been working on a project dealing with custom resources which map to resources on the cloud all of that isnt too important ive summarized my issue below ive been working with these custom resources in go gt the problem below has been shorted to keep the important parts didnt want to bore you all with impl details so suppose i have 3 custom resources ill call them a b and x now a and b have a parent and child relationship where when i create a a corresponding b will be created x is is an independent resource now x represents a request to join a group x has many fields but here are the important ones yaml spec groupid this will identify the a resource which can get me to the b resource joinerid this will identity the joining resource this is something i need to have on here with the project requirements i have now at any point in time inside b i need a list of all joiner id and the order is not important to me here are the issues i run in to x resource type can be deployed at anytime so there are concurrency issues if i take x and write into the status spec of b or a am i correct here here are some ideas ive some up with but gave up due to an issue using locks inside a resource and each time x wants to associate with b resource i can capture it in an array i planned to update the spec of b where b would hold an array of joinerids and i would append to it but it seems like if i use locks in this manner i may get memory leaks querying inside b to get all x resources where the x spec groupid was meant to go to that b resource this seems to be very wasteful of resources and kinda slow if many x resources get made and each reconcile will get super expensive all in all im really feeling stuck and the ideas i come up with just like bad practice and i feel like if i actually manage to implement what i said above i will be hurting the future devs on this project thanks for reading if you made it this far thanks for you help on this one this feels like an x y problem i want the boring details da fuck you are trying to do none of it makes much sense reconciliation is eventually consistent in kubernetes it may absolutely be that one reconciliation run will perform suboptimal actions but the next reconciliation run will correct that since you at least conceptually evaluate the state of all resources on every reconciliation run if such desyncs are unacceptable you need to formulate your crds differently if you post more concrete details about the actual problem it would be easier to give helpful suggestions no a b and x are different crds each with different managers a and b are parent and child respectively where is x is alone let me know if that s a bad explanation i m happy to elaborate that way you phrase this makes me think that a b and x are all instances of the same crd is this correct if so i think this is where your implementation starts to fall apart x should be a different crd and the controller should be aware of status changes to b though to be honest i m not seeing a huge race condition here since1 etcd provides sequential consistency so you won t run into an issue where a member is updated outside of quorum and also this feels somewhat like the wrong usecase for crds this almost feels like a relational database might be a better suit for your application ok i understand i can just repost with the actual issue and remove this post what is a x y problem

print to pdf no longer works in headless mode with edge 141 post 2 oct the real question is what hasn t been broken with the 141 update no quality control whatsoever also most of this issues come from upstream and affect all chromium browsers including chrome itself however this time chrome is working till now am taling about argumentlist headless disable gpu print to pdf path my development team was able to solve our issue with this update by changing the arguments as shown below headless new user data dir 0 disable gpu print to pdf no header no pdf header footer print to pdf 1 2 we had to add the user data dir because we were facing issues with cache being shared across different files during the conversion hope this helps nice can confirm fwiw you can apparently put any directory path in there do you use a fresh temporary dir for each call this creates a 14 mb worth of stuff so best to clean it up afterwards headless new is not needed cause is default mode of headless unless microsoft did something wrong we are seeing the same i migrated our scripts to use chrome as a stop gap for now as it s working fine but it s not a long term solution i dislike multiple browsers on my servers if i can help it yes we did the same but some machines chrome is not permitted as per security rules so looking

comfyui 0 3 63 subgraph publishing selection toolbox redesign hi community we re excited to announce two new updates in comfyui 0 3 63 subgraph publish selection toolbox redesign these two features are here to streamline your work with comfyui and offer you a more seamless experience let s take a closer look subgraph publishing previously we didn t support publishing or saving a subgraph to make it more reusable but now this feature is available subgraph publishing the subgraph publish feature enables you to save your subgraph to the node library there are two ways to publish your subgraph 1 use the publish icon on the selection toolbox 2 use the new selection toolbox menu to publish it selection toolbox menu after publishing you can find it under node library subgraph blueprints then you can use it just like a regular node subgraph blueprints in node library and when you want to make changes to it you can edit it like a normal subgraph and then update it edit subgraph this makes subgraphs far more flexible and useful for more details about subgraph please check our docs selection toolbox redesign the selection toolbox has been redesigned we used new icons to make it easier to identify we also added an expandable menu this opens up more possibilities for future feature extensions selection toolbox redesign in future selection toolbox updates we might support customizing the features of the selection toolbox so stay tuned future customizable selection box as always enjoy creating more info blog post docs subgraph question about subgraphs can you clone them and therefore save space in the json file as it s just a clone and not another standalone group of nodes selection toolbox became big it s like right click menu somehow the new update deleted my exe file and i cant start my comfyui anymore thanks for that i guess

what can you do it hurts worse that my actual top 2 picks for aoty didn t even make the cut apocalypse hotel and the summer hikaru died i don t know whether to be more upset with the public or the jury for that oversight so boo to you both of the picks we got i decided to give my vote to shoushimin s2 this second season elevated a good show to a near masterpiece brilliantly blending high stakes detective drama with gripping character dynamics i would highly recommend this series to anyone main votes short film mamiko s poop how could i not music video on being hiroaka s morphing animations are as mesmerizing as always movie kimi no iro well i am a yamada fangirl aoty redacted gt which anime surprised you the most to see in the three categories dress up darling s2 being a jury nomination i felt the same way about spy x family s2 in 2023 out of left field entries from the jury are always in the cards of course but second seasons of such popular series needing the jury to get in blindsides me this time around i m more stunned than with sxf since dress up darling stepped things up tremendously from a production standpoint on another note the aoty lineup is missing a lot i would ve loved to see apocalypse hotel milky subway ruri rocks and hikaru are all shows i liked more or around as much as my favorite nominees this year city while i didn t enjoy it much personally is such an outstanding work of animation that its absence still feels odd to be honest this time around i don t enjoy either the jury or the public s selection too much not really many options for me included my votes mamiko s poop self explanatory sunflower that wants to die such a mesmerizing mv paired with one of my favourite songs of the year tatsuki fujimoto 17 26 an anthology with no weak entries in my mind consistently impressive in their production and most nail their ideas very well orb ftw questions the anime of the year jury line up was easily the most surprising no medalist apocalypse hotel or hikaru were obvious snubs and i didn t think ave mujica would be able to get in ahead of them considering what i perceive as its endless problems but it did as for movies mononoke being a public pick was rather surprising but i guess that just shows it wasn t really a stacked year in terms of popular film releases that would be eligible i had watched none before and watched a few of the shorts jury recommended ones public nominating two gacha pvs i think communicates how many most saw public and jury nom columns as how many i nominated completed out of 100 completions for accidentally installed cuda 13 0 and now cant run pytorch due to compatibility issues what do i do this is the error i got the detected cuda version 13 0 mismatches the version that was used to compile pytorch 12 1 please make sure to use the same cuda versions really frustrated always build your projects in containers never build your projects in containers just uninstall it and install the correct version if you want your global install to be good it is best practice to use a venv or some other environment manager for each project to avoids boo boos like this i used to just raw dog everything with my global environment and i still do sometimes but i ve learned it s better to just make a venv when i start a new project hmm pytorch pip typically just handles this for you torch doesn t use the system cuda toolkit unless you re compiling things from source you can be explicit about which cuda version you want in your requirements txt index url torch 2 5 1 or with pip install torch x x x index url but the following should just work out of the box python3 m venv venv amp amp source venv bin activate pip install r requirements txt with just torch x x x in it python3 main py are you using the system level pythyon env or maybe you re using conda which behaves differently torch already comes with cuda install another cuda version along the new one source that to your env unless the driver versions are incompatible i highly suggest you use conda environments for pytorch they will also pull in the correct version of cuda to run it makes life much easier to manage conda is obsolete an nvidia container as base then pip

ubuntu 25 10 unattended upgrades broken due to rust coreutils bug as per their mailing list the issue is fixed gt due to a now resolved bug in the date command some ubuntu 25 10 systems have been unable to automatically check for available software updates affected machines include cloud deployments container images ubuntu desktop and ubuntu server installs gt gt to check if your system is affected run dpkg l rust coreutils and check the version field systems with version 0 2 2 0ubuntu2 1 or later are not affected gt gt if your system is using rust coreutils lt 0 2 2 0ubuntu2 you can remediate the issue by manually updating the rust coreutils package gt gt sudo apt install update rust coreutils gt gt if you have been manually updating your system using apt or otherwise you are likely unaffected by this issue phoronix commenters truly are the dumbest of the dumb holy moly i d imagine testing flatpak is not exactly one of their highest priorities this plus flatpak not working on a fresh 25 10 install do ubuntu developers actually test their releases before making them available i bet youtube commenters would give them a run for their money i don t get why they are doing this switch i love rust but the gnu utils are fine and the rust coreutils are still not production ready this just causes breaking issues for little benefit gt uutils accepts all of gnu coreutils flags by default even if they have not been implemented yet they are simply ignored without an error wtf this is beyond moronic and a real security risk it is fixed as in if you manually update your system it will pull in this fix it is literally impossible to fix this issue short of releasing a respun image which will not solve the issue for all those users having installed the existing one for users relying on unattended updates because the unattended updates will not see any updates at all so they will also not see the fix for this issue sounds like this slipped through because uutils accepts all of gnu coreutils flags by default even if they have not been implemented yet they are simply ignored without an error would be nice if there was some switch env variable one could set to make uutils error on yet to be implemented flags to make sure you don t use those excepting them to actually do something i wouldn t be surprised if uutils already has such a switch but it just wasn t enabled by ubuntu devs when testing uutils are working towards passing the gnu test suite and they have a graph of their progress on their github and a more detailed breakdown in their documentation going by their previous progress over the years we might expect them to be at parity in a year or two ubuntu however has their next lts scheduled for april 2026 and they likely want to test drive uutils coreutils for one ordinary release before deciding on whether to commit to it for long term support

the good the bad and the leaky jemalloc bumpalo and mimalloc in meilisearch super interesting read thanks for that sorry i clarified the sentence in the post i was talking about the mimalloc s override feature this is awesome we are using meili in prod and i love seeing it evolve i somehow have weird latency issues running it on aws frequently takes 500ms to respond for no reason but with a bit of caching it s still been super reliable and a pleasure to work with are there plans to merge the allocator settings you tried into the meili docker image assuming you have a workload you can use to repro locally a tool like heaptrack let s you see right away whether you have a true leak in your code or whether the leaked memory is from your malloc implementation an effect of fragmentation for instance you have to pay attention to the magnitudes too rather than chasing the small reported leak that could t possibly be the cause of the rss you are seeing i wonder if you also hit this as we did i haven t looked to see what v3 does crickets didn t inspire confidence great writeup the bumpalo approach for indexing is clever using an arena allocator for a phase where you know all allocations share the same lifetime makes perfect sense the traditional problem with arenas is that you pay for the high water mark in memory but if your indexing batches are bounded that s a reasonable tradeoff for eliminating fragmentation entirely the jemalloc not a leak just retained memory issue is one that bites a lot of long running rust services jemalloc s decay based purging means freed pages get returned to the os on a timer not immediately for services with bursty allocation patterns like indexing you can end up with jemalloc holding onto pages long after the burst is over the background thread option helps but tuning dirty decay ms and muzzy decay ms can make a big difference too curious whether you tried tikv jemallocator with custom conf strings before switching to mimalloc or if the bumpalo approach made the allocator choice mostly irrelevant for the indexing path thanks for the kind words about the perf issue i would recommend providing graphs some logs try using the new showperformancedetails parameter to understand why or fill an issue on github if you can t find the reason the memory usage fix i m describing in my blog will land on monday so will be available in the docker image and all binaries at the same time enjoy thanks appreciate the compliment i was just debugging a jemalloc leak the other day very interesting read thank you very much for the advice i didn t know about heaptrack next time i ll give it a try i hope never thanks for the info we are testing on a linux with nvme machine it s closer to our production machines however we will see how it goes in production by monday

what is the solution for this error in bechkoff twincat3 when i try to start the tsm resolved by uninstalling and installing the cnc export tf5210 the twincat 3 win32 error 2 typically occurs because the twincat system service cannot locate its own executable or a required driver file often due to an incomplete installation a corrupted registry path or an overzealous antivirus program quarantining the tcsyssrv exe file to resolve this you should first verify that the service is pointing to the correct file path usually c twincat 3 1 system tcsyssrv exe in the windows services manager and ensure that your real time ethernet drivers are properly installed and not disabled if the files are physically present but the error persists manually re registering the service via the command prompt using the regserver command or performing a repair through the twincat installer is usually the most effective way to restore the missing links and get the system back into config or run mode how to check on windows service manager thanks for the info

python hate on x python is a glue between efficient modules that can be implemented in other languages at my company we use django python but the ocr libs we use certainly don t run in plain python this kind of hate is usually an indication of lack of experience it pops up every few years deleted stop using x it s a cesspool java java don t take these people seriously exactly i maintained a python app of over 500kloc probably close to 1m and it was fine for the purpose i think that they are different tools and that you don t want to be using a hammer as a screwdriver and voce versa and i also think that i am too old to be having this discussion over and over especially on x of all places the entire internet and x more than others is very negative in general there is a lot of hate for anything people don t like use or know anything about we use django for our huge saas platform and any performance issue we have are caused by our own code first i e being inefficient with queries etc before we blame python django as always monitor performance understand what s going on and evaluate your options pick a stack that your team knows and is productive with it that allows you to get things done first and not worry about performance when you have 10 customers if there is a part where another language would be more efficient use that for that specific part for example at one of my previous job we had an endpoint whose only job was to receive a huge amount of req s and store the event in a place and they moved it out of django and to go as it was better for that specific use case i would argue for that use case you could even just put a python lambda in front and keep python and let aws handle load why are you still on x it s a cesspool if you want good python content check out mastodon or bluesky as for your complaint django is used on the web on the web python is almost never the slowest part that s database access network latency and other issues if you re talking device drivers yeah don t wrote those in python python and django are slow by default for independent reasons django s slowness only partially relates to python you can get around that with correct tuning and smart library use but it takes extra work is that a dealbreaker not necessarily if i have something with moderate traffic moderate data volumes and high data integrity requirements say a backoffice system i d happily go with django not only is it plenty fast for that case it s also really good at handling the challenging parts of such a project if i m doing a high throughput bulk data processing service will i go with django well i could but at that point the mental overhead of trying to get it fast enough probably isn t worth it i d much rather use say go which just does it better out of the box different tools work best for different situations instagram went to a million users on django

elementor issues and domain transfer hi all hoping to get some direction here i have a wordpress website that i had professionally created in elementor then handed the website off to me to tweak the website to my liking but i m having two problems my homepage has a video header that loops in the background however i can t seem to find the section within elementor that actually has the file link it doesn t seem to be a simple add or subtract video setting option i cannot for the life of me get support to properly show me how to transfer my previous domain from wix to wordpress they tell me to start with the upgrades option from my wordpress dashboard but within elementor that doesn t seem to be an option any help would be greatly appreciated 1 header please share your url and screenshots of you editing the homepage in elementor 2 domain name who is your web host what is your domain name it sounds like you might be hosting with wordpress com if you can t find the video in the background setting of the style tab of your header it might be added via custom css but this is a low probability if your domain is registered at wix you can change its name servers to point it to another hosting provider or wordpress com s name servers if your elementor site is hosted there it s better to transfer it to a well known hosting company or cloudflare rather than keeping it registered through wix the video is likely in the column not the section or division it is the background layer 1 background video is usually in the main container gt gt style gt gt background gt gt background type video 2 what hosting are you using for your elementor site usually you just have to point out your dns from wix to your current hosting the video header is almost always set in the background tab of the section that contains it open the page edit the top most section with elementor click the style tab look under background gt video or image video that field holds the url or media id if you don t see a video setting check if a custom css rule is pulling in the background search the editor for background video or inspect the element with your browser dev tools domain transfer isn t an elementor thing at all it s a dns hosting issue 1 log into the account where the domain is currently registered wix 2 unlock the domain and get its auth code also called epp code 3 in the wordpress host s control panel request a transfer and paste that auth code 4 during the transfer you ll be asked to set the nameservers point them at your new host s nameservers or update the a record to the ip of your wordpress server 5 once the dns propagates usually 24 48 hrs go into wp admin settings general and make sure wordpress address and site address match the new domain elementor elementor layout breaks out of the blue it s your cache not elementor s caching pages without their styles if you switch the css to load internally you prevent your cache from preloading the pages without their styles since clearing elementor cache fixes it it s probably a caching or plugin conflict try turning off litespeed cache and wp meteor one at a time to see if that helps also make sure elementor and your plugins are updated stick to one caching plugin to avoid issues try switching the css print method to internal embedding in the elementor settings gt performance page it s very likely your cache is preloading pages without styles this will prevent it from happening since you re using cache already the tradeoff of loading css embedded would be surpassed by serving the pages from cache i ve had this issue as well and reached out to elementor their tech support said to turn off the elementor cache i haven t had this issue since i ve done that loading embedded css is much faster in my experience as long as the quantity is low and you pair it with a plugin that will remove unused css ugh i ve been there last month i spent 3 hours fighting with elementor because it kept crashing every time i tried to add a new section turns out it was a conflict between elementor pro and my caching plugin here s what saved my sanity 1 deactivated all plugins except elementor 2 reactivated them one by one 3 found the culprit was wp rocket cache 4 added a simple exclusion rule in the settings the frustrating part this is like the 4th time i ve run into plugin conflicts with wordpress you d think after 5 years of using it i d learn to check plugin conflicts first instead of assuming it s something i broke for anyone reading this always start with plugin conflicts when wordpress acts weird save yourself the headache i went through i really hate elementor and prefer gutenburg but i inhereted a website built with it and it s a waste to rebuild it from scratch good old crap never misses an opportunity to surprise what a waste of time to learn proper workaround what useless knowledge i went through the same thing several years ago i was using an image optimization plugin that behaved exactly as you described and we even lost a client because of it so i totally understand your frustration what i suggest is to review the entire caching setup on your site your host s caching any server side caching elementor caching try not using it for some time and the theme s caching etc i really suspect your issue is related to some caching issue you can try free wp optimize plugin as w3 tc is too heavy demanding for setup for an average user i also flush caches after editing but the issue is happening without any dev work website works fine after edits but breaks 3 days later
